'''thasutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibrofog|fibrofog]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-s-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibrofog|fibrofog]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thasutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thæsitith || thæsitij || thæsitish || thæsiti
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thasusututh || thasusutuj || thasusutush || thasusutu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thasututh || thasutuj || thasutush || thasutu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thasuftufth || thasuftufj || thasuftufsh || thasuftuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || thasututhu || thasutuju || thasutushu || thasutuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || thasututh || thasutuj || thasutush || thasutu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || thasututhul || thasutujul || thasutushul || thasutukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || thasutuuthuthu || thasutuujuju || thasutuushushu || thasutuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || thasututhun || thasutujun || thasutushun || thasutukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || thasututhuoro || thasutujuoro || thasutushuoro || thasutukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
